classes.storageReference: Git Credential Manager (local) + Atlas custody record atlas/custody/repository-access
classes.revocationPath: Revoke provider PAT/App grant, remove credential manager entry, verify remote denial
Disable host/account access, issue replacement admin credential, verify old path fails

classes.revocationPath: Revoke archive access, rotate archive credential, verify replacement-only access

classes.storageReference: GitHub Actions secrets + ~/.openclaw/.env + auth profile references + 1Password references
classes.rotationInterval: 90 days or immediate on suspected exposure

classes.rotationInterval: 90 days or immediate on suspected exposure
classes.revocationPath: Disable token/app secret, replace reference, verify unauthorized requests fail
